GitHubApiData.name: HAMusicAssistantJukebox
GitHubApiData.description: A guest friendly jukebox solution for those running Music Assistant Server on Home Assistant OS

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: 为在 Home Assistant OS 上运行 Music Assistant Server 的用户提供的访客友好型点歌机解决方案。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: Home Assistant OS上でMusic Assistant Serverを運用する方向けのゲストフレンドリーなジュークボックスソリューション
TranslatedDescriptions.en: A guest-friendly jukebox solution for users running Music Assistant Server on Home Assistant OS.
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: Home Assistant OS에서 Music Assistant Server를 실행하는 사용자를 위한 게스트 친화적인 주크박스 솔루션입니다.
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Una solución de jukebox amigable para invitados para quienes usan Music Assistant Server en Home Assistant OS.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Une solution de jukebox conviviale pour les invités, destinée à ceux utilisant Music Assistant Server sur Home Assistant OS.
